---
title: "scientific_notation"
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
**Source:** [`scientific_notation.py`](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/scientific_notation.py)
:::


## API Reference

### `PowersOf10` {#powersof10}

```python
class PowersOf10
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/scientific_notation.py#L5){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `PowersOf10.x10y_strings` {#powersof10-x10y_strings}

```python
def x10y_strings(number, decimals: int)
```

Strings x,y for writing: number=x*10^y

decimals = number of decimal places after the dot in the "a" string

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/scientific_notation.py#L7){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

### `to_LaTeX` {#to_latex}

```python
class to_LaTeX
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/scientific_notation.py#L20){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `to_LaTeX.as_x10y` {#to_latex-as_x10y}

```python
def as_x10y(number, decimals: int, dot_symb: typing.Literal['', '\\cdot', '\\times']='\\times', include_dollars=False)
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/scientific_notation.py#L22){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---
